---
title: "Isabella Lucy Bishop"
---

## Isabella Lucy Bishop

**Dates:** (1831-1904)

**Maiden name:** (Bird)

### Description

travel-writer

### Letters

- Letter from July 17 [1900]
- Letter from Edinburgh, 1st.July 1893
- Letter from Jany 7th [1851-1881]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
